headline: Moonshot AI's open-source Kimi K2.7 Code anchors a window dominated by agentic coding tooling and a shift in how engineers work.
body: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, a one-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts agentic coding model paired with a terminal CLI for repository exploration and test execution. The window leans heavily on developer workflow concerns: practitioners are reporting that LLMs like Claude are becoming the primary tool for code generation while human review and abstraction are de-emphasized, and others are building Agentic OS frameworks around skills, loop, and memory management to extend Claude Code. On hardware, inference hardware and custom silicon broke out alongside reporting that Europe is resisting Washington's chip export restrictions, with ASML noting limited Chinese access to older lithography tools. Anthropic separately accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities.

cited_items.title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
